title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Nurse Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Nurse Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
